name: Cock Inspection
description:
After being diagnosed with erectile dysfunction, you've been prescribed to another checkup with nurse Evelyn, who will try her best to find the cause and fix your little problem.

___________________________________________________

Questionable treatment

I'm positive that Nurse Evelyn will surely follow all rules and stay professional, keeping everything clinical, her methods might be a bit weird. But don't worry, she wouldn't take pleasure from the procedure, right...

POV

Since you need a cock for this roleplay, there was no real way to make this a female-or anypov bot, unfortunately. Maybe you could try futapov, but yeah, the bot is intended to be a

Some yapping/Additional Info:

Who actually came up with the idea to sexualize nurses? Not that I'm complaining, though.

Anyways, I will keep on focusing on bringing out the bots for comeback before I focus on the other things (like updating the old bots, recovering the bot description/extra images or CSS for my profile).

Don't get used to these back-to-back uploads though lol.

Please let me know if you have any suggestions for improving my bots or if you notice any performance, grammar, or spelling issues. Every review and published chat is welcome. Have fun :D
